glossary.definition: A hypercomplex number of the form q = a + bi + cj + dk, where a, b, c, d are real numbers and i, j, k satisfy the quaternion multiplication rules i² = j² = k² = ijk = -1. Quaternions form a non-commutative division algebra.
The four-dimensional associative algebra over the reals, denoted \mathbb{H}, generated by basis elements 1, i, j, k with multiplication rules i² = j² = k² = ijk = -1.
Replace with precise definitions as they are used in the paper. Do not paraphrase standard definitions without citing the source.
